explanation: Inserted quotes around the executable path to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to quoted paths.
Used a standard path without any mutation to ensure the baseline command matches the Sigma rule.
Used alternative capitalization and path normalization to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to these variations.
Used uppercase hexadecimal notation for 0xffffffff to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to case variations.
Used lowercase for the -ForceV1 flag to test if the Sigma rule is case-sensitive.
Used no mutation as a control to confirm the Sigma rule detects the expected command line.
